basic_details.job_title: Delhi University Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 20 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Delhi University Assistant Professor (Guest Basis) Notification 2026 has been released on 15 June 2026 on the official website https://www.du.ac.in/ under Advt. No. DSJ/2026/365. A total of 20 vacancies have been announced through the Delhi University Assistant Professor (Guest Basis) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Journalism & Mass Communication: Qualifications for guest faculty shall be the same as those prescribed for the appointment of regular Assistant Professor of colleges under UGC regulations. The minimum API score required for shortlisting candidates is as prescribed by the University of Delhi. Language Category: Qualifications for guest faculty shall be the same as those prescribed for the appointment of regular Assistant Professor of colleges under UGC regulations. The minimum API score required for shortlisting candidates is as prescribed by the University of Delhi.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Delhi University Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Delhi University to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download Delhi University Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download Delhi University Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Delhi University Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Assistant Professor (Guest Basis) posts at Delhi University is 05 July 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Assistant Professor (Guest Basis) at Delhi University?
faq.answer: Delhi University has announced a total of 20 vacancies for the Assistant Professor (Guest Basis) positions. These vacancies are distributed across different departments as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the Delhi University Assistant Professor (Guest Basis) recruitment is strictly online. Candidates are required to submit their applications through the official portal before the closing date.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications for the Assistant Professor (Guest Basis) positions are as per UGC regulations for Assistant Professors. Candidates must also meet the minimum API score requirements set by the University of Delhi.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for Delhi University Assistant Professor recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any application charges.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Assistant Professor (Guest Basis) positions at Delhi University will primarily involve an online interview. Candidates shortlisted based on their applications will be called for the interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor (Guest Basis) role?
faq.answer: The salary for the Assistant Professor (Guest Basis) positions will be as per UGC norms. Specific details regarding the pay scale can be found in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. Which departments have vacancies for Assistant Professor?
faq.answer: Vacancies are available in the Journalism & Mass Communication department (16 posts) and the Language Category (4 posts). These are the primary areas where recruitment is being conducted.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from outside Delhi apply for these positions?
faq.answer: The notification specifies that applications are invited from eligible candidates in Delhi. While not explicitly stated that only Delhi residents can apply, it's advisable to check the detailed eligibility criteria in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link are provided in the "Important Links" section of this article. You can also visit the official website of Delhi University for more information.
